description: alpha/beta/gamma 共享身份、真实图片来源与媒体派生真相源。运行时只消费 media objectKey 派生后的 URL。

mediaContract.urlDerivation: runtime joins MEDIA_*_CDN_BASE_URL or gateway base with objectKey

associationRules.circleThemeRefs: derive from owned circles and memberships primaryTheme/secondaryThemes
associationRules.groupPersonaMix: derive from group conversation member roles ordered by conversation member order
